judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes fresh air, but it drops required immediate actions to keep the person calm and assist breathing if needed. It also adds unsupported instructions, including a wrong-incident vomiting warning, plus loosen clothing and sit upright, which are not grounded in the source.
